name: Kecap Manis (Sweet Soy Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Soy sauce; Chinese dark - 2 3/4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat the sugar over low heat and stir frequently until it melts.
2. Add the soy sauce and all other ingredients to the caramelized sugar.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil and continue stirring until the sugar has dissolved completely.
4. Reduce the heat to low and cook for 10 minutes.
5. Allow the thickened syrup to cool, then pour into one or more bottles.
The author recommends not straining the sauce, as the garlic, star anise, salam leaves, and galangal are believed to continue providing flavor. The sauce keeps refrigerated for several months and yields about 2 3/4 cups. It may also be available under the "Conimex" label as Ketjap Benteng Manis.
